data.current_description: Retrieve details about a specific producer.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information about a specific producer or winery by ID. Returns the producer object containing name, contact information, and other producer details. Use this operation when you need to access specific producer information referenced in product data.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks context about what details are returned and when an AI agent should use this operation. Added information about return value structure, producer type context (winery), and use case guidance for AI agents.

Original description lacks detail about pagination support, return structure, and use cases. Enhanced to clarify that pagination is available, explain the response format, and provide context for when AI agents should call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all available product categories in the LCBO catalog. Supports pagination through the provided parameters. data.current_description: Returns product inventory data across stores. Filter by product ID and/or store ID.
data.description_suggestion: Returns paginated inventory data showing product availability and stock levels across LCBO stores. Supports filtering by product ID and/or store ID to retrieve specific inventory records. Each record includes product ID, store ID, quantity on hand, and reorder status.
